case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MARTIN ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-15-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) MARTIN ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ; TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-14-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200028869) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MARTIN ANTONIO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200028871) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA RODRIGUEZ, JOSE FRANCISCO

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MARTIN ANTONIO MUNGUIA RODRIGUEZ, JOSE FRANCISCO DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-14-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-19-2021

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200019765), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-30-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-02-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT MUNGUIA RODRIGUEZ, JOSE FRANCISCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-15-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
